creator: twm@pdp11.pw
text:
Created attachment 226918
update Prosody to 0.11.10

net-im/prosody: update to 0.11.10

* Update to 0.11.10
* Change rc script so it still supports but not longer
  requires the 'pidfile' user option (fixes bug #257212)

ChangeLog:

  https://blog.prosody.im/prosody-0.11.10-released/
  https://prosody.im/security/advisory_20210722/

QA:

  * portlint: OK (1 warning regarding the use of /var/db)
  * testport: OK (poudriere: 11.4-i386, 11.4-amd64, 12.2-i386,
                  12.2-amd64, 13.0-amd64, 13.0-arm64)

This release fixes CVE-2021-37601.
An update from all previous versions is recommended.
